image_prompt: SVG: speed-time graph, Speed / ms⁻¹ (0-80, ticks 10, minor 2) vs Time / s (0-25, ticks 5, minor 1), straight line declining from (0,80) to (20,60), teal × markers at both endpoints.

render_data.title: Velocity–time graph: vehicle decelerating through the pipe
render_data.areaReadout: Pipe length = area under v–t graph = ½(v₁ + v₂) × t = ½(80 + 60) × 20 = 1400 m
render_data.task: Read off the entry speed (80 m s⁻¹), exit speed (60 m s⁻¹) and time (20 s), then find the pipe length from the area under the line.

image_prompt: SVG: scatter graph Frequency / Hz (0-1800, ticks 200, minor 40) vs 1/Length / m⁻¹ (0-6, ticks 1, minor 0.2), five points (2.0,720),(2.5,900),(3.3,1200),(4.0,1440),(5.0,1800) with a straight best-fit line through the origin stopping at the last point (5.0,1800); gradient = speed of sound = 360 m/s.

render_data.title: Frequency against 1/Length for the air columns

readouts.note: point to plot (0.40 m bottle: 1/L = 2.5, f = 900 Hz)

render_data.bestFit: Straight line of best fit through the origin (0,0) and (5.0, 1800).
render_data.gradientReadout: Gradient = Δf / Δ(1/L) = (1800 − 0) / (5.0 − 0) = 360 → speed of sound = 360 m s⁻¹
render_data.task: Plot the missing point (2.5, 900) for the 0.40 m bottle, draw the best-fit line through the origin, then read the gradient (= speed of sound = 360 m s⁻¹).
